site.name: ScoopCraft Pints
site.summary: Premium custom ice cream pint ecommerce with build-your-box, wishlist, secure session auth, checkout, order tracking, admin CRUD, and SEO settings.

faqHighlights: How to build a custom pint
How delivery keeps ice cream fresh

commercePolicyFacts.shippingMethod: Cold-chain insulated packaging with dry ice
commercePolicyFacts.subscriptionDiscount: 20% off on weekly subscription in build/checkout flow

couponCodes.discount: 10% off base total before final total

products.name: Midnight Cocoa Swirl Pint
products.description: Deep cocoa gelato folded with dark fudge ribbons and sea-salt crunch.

products.name: Blueberry Cheesecake Pint
products.description: Creamy cheesecake base layered with blueberry compote and biscuit crumble.

products.name: Mango Coconut Cloud Pint
products.description: Tropical mango sorbet marbled with coconut cream and toasted flakes.

products.name: Pistachio Honey Crunch Pint
products.description: Roasted pistachio base with wildflower honey and caramelized nut brittle.

products.name: Strawberry Matcha Velvet Pint
products.description: Silky matcha cream paired with strawberry ribbons and white chocolate pearls.

products.name: Caramel Coffee Crunch Pint
products.description: Cold-brew coffee base with salted caramel and espresso bean crunch.

products.name: Vanilla Berry Ripple Pint
products.description: Madagascar vanilla with raspberry ripple and shortbread cookie crumble.

products.name: Hazelnut Praline Pint
products.description: Roasted hazelnut cream with praline shards and silky milk chocolate folds.

products.name: Lemon Basil Sorbet Pint
products.description: Zesty lemon sorbet with basil syrup ribbons and candied peel bites.

products.name: Cookie Butter Dream Pint
products.description: Spiced cookie butter base layered with biscuit chunks and caramel swirls.

products.name: Cherry Chocolate Noir Pint
products.description: Dark chocolate base with black cherry compote and cocoa nib crackle.

products.name: Salted Maple Pecan Pint
products.description: Maple cream with toasted pecans, sea-salt caramel, and butter toffee chips.

products.name: Passionfruit Yogurt Pint
products.description: Tangy yogurt base infused with passionfruit puree and honey granola bites.

products.name: Mocha Brownie Batter Pint
products.description: Mocha cream packed with fudgy brownie chunks and chocolate sauce ribbons.

products.name: Rose Pistachio Kulfi Pint
products.description: Kulfi-inspired cream with rose syrup, pistachio bits, and saffron threads.

products.name: Banoffee Pie Pint
products.description: Banana cream with toffee ribbons, pie crust crumble, and cocoa dust.

products.name: Black Sesame Honey Pint
products.description: Toasted black sesame cream balanced with floral honey and brittle shards.
